results.title: Emma Barnett: Fighting Endometriosis
results.overview: Emma Barnett shares her life-long struggle with endometriosis – a disease affecting one in ten women of reproductive age, which causes excruciating, often debilitating, pain.  Inside Emma’s body, rogue cells similar to the lining of the womb mysteriously appear on other organs, creating lesions which bleed, scar and cause inflammation. There is no cure. Endometriosis is as common as diabetes but receives a fraction of the research funding.  Emma travels across the UK to meet a few of the millions of women who, like her, are suffering. Through candid conversations, they reveal the extent to which endometriosis is devastating the lives of women – affecting fertility, work and loved ones.

results.title: Hazme Una Pregunta
results.overview: Phillip, an office worker who is about to be promoted, and Gwen, an anthropologist, are a couple leading a quiet, stable life. At first, Phillip thinks it’s all a coincidence; however, as the days go by, he notices that his girlfriend’s attitude changes strangely in the early hours of the morning and that she is able to predict future events with certainty. It all begins at 3:33 a.m. when Gwen insists that Phillip ask her a question.

results.title: The Hermit Crab
results.overview: The story follows Quân, a grieving husband devastated by the sudden death of his wife in a tragic accident. His shattered happiness seems miraculously restored when his wife’s spirit appears to return within the body of a female colleague—the only survivor of the same accident. Like hermit crabs borrowing shells to survive, they cling to borrowed identities in an attempt to escape the pain of their lives. But their fragile happiness begins to unravel when a horrifying secret surrounding his wife’s death comes to light, forcing Quân to choose between clinging to the illusion of comfort or exposing the terrifying truth hidden beneath the shell he has created.

results.title: Antarctica - Domain One
results.overview: Vast, wild, yet extremely fragile. The coldest place on our planet is also one of the most affected by global warming and needs to be protected. The expedition focuses on exploring, documenting, and surfing in the South Shetland Islands and the Antarctic Peninsula, in the area known as Domain 1, which is being pushed for Marine Protected Area (MPA) status. Protected areas are very important for mitigating climate change and, in this case, also for regulating human activities such as concentrated fishing. This film helps us understand the importance of this area and the threats affecting it.

results.title: 18 Months

Through striking images created with fire and soot by visual artist Steven Spazuk, the film depicts Léger’s personality in rich nuances of shadow and light. The transformations paint a sensitive portrait of a man who, despite his mental health struggles, has been able to rise from the ashes.

results.title: Muskox
results.overview: Menace ventures deep into the heart of the Arctic-one of the planet's most extreme environments-to capture the timeless struggle of the musk oxen, rugged and majestic survivors of the Ice Age. Filmed over several years, the documentary follows the herd through the brutal rhythm of the seasons, revealing a world of endurance, fragility, and adaptation. Narrated by acclaimed British actress Daisy Head (The Gray House, Shadow and Bone, The Sandman), the film combines breathtaking imagery and an evocative score by Christian Heschl to explore the resilience of life at the top of the world. Directed by Chris Schmid, Menace is both a tribute and a warning-a cinematic reflection on strength, legacy, and the unseen forces shaping our planet's most remote wild places.

results.title: Stankface Standing Soldier: The Rise of Mato Wayuhi

Mato is known for composing the score for the Emmy-nominated series Reservation Dogs. Outside of the realm of composing, Mato engages with his community and the world through his talents as a rapper. Stankface Standing Soldier: The Rise of Mato Wayuhi provides a glimpse into the up-and-coming Oglala Lakota artist’s life as a rising rapper and composer. With the release of his recent album, Stankface Standing Soldier, the audience receives a deeper look into Mato’s personal inspiration and upbringing. This documentary showcases Mato’s versatility as a performer, showcasing his creative path led by his ancestors and his father’s voice.

results.title: The Metropolitan Opera: El Último Sueño de Frida y Diego
results.original_title: The Metropolitan Opera: El Último Sueño de Frida y Diego
results.overview: American composer Gabriela Lena Frank’s first opera, a magical-realist portrait of Mexico’s painterly power couple Frida Kahlo and Diego Rivera, with libretto by Pulitzer Prize–winning playwright Nilo Cruz. Fashioned as a reversal of the Orpheus and Euridice myth, the story depicts Frida, sung by leading mezzo-soprano Isabel Leonard, leaving the underworld on the Day of the Dead and reuniting with Diego, portrayed by baritone Carlos Álvarez. The famously feuding pair briefly relive their tumultuous love, embracing both the passion and the pain before bidding the land of the living a final farewell. Music Director Yannick Nézet-Séguin conducts the Met-premiere staging of Frank’s opera, a “confident, richly imagined score” (The New Yorker) that “bursts with color and fresh individuality” (Los Angeles Times).

results.title: PAPERWINGS
results.overview: In a cramped apartment that feels like it’s collapsing in on itself, two young men try to outrun addiction and each other. Jay is fighting for sobriety. Alex is fighting not to feel. When pills resurface between them, what starts as a familiar argument spirals into a breaking point that tests the limits of love, loyalty, and survival. Paperwings is an intimate, claustrophobic portrait of codependency, recovery, and the fragile hope of choosing to live.

results.title: Demonic Plastic Surgery

Drawn into the "Đi Thiếp" ritual, Thanh is forced to make a choice: to remain in the underworld by her lover’s side, or fight to escape the clutches of the dark forces.

results.title: Queering India
results.overview: As the Supreme Court refuses to grant marriage equality, Queering India captures a pivotal moment in the world’s largest democracy. Through the eyes of journalist and actor Swapnesh Dubey, the film weaves a powerful narrative, combining his coming-out journey with voices from across India. This multilingual documentary doesn’t look outward for validation, it looks inward, reclaiming a forgotten truth: that queerness in Indian culture was once revered, not erased. It confronts colonial hangovers, societal silences, and the class and language divides that shape who gets to participate in the national conversation.

results.title: L'oratore

The security guard Enzo, after an argument, destroys his piano into many pieces. Chased by loan sharks, he finds himself in the back of a church. He is given a jacket and tie and is sent to the altar in front of the dead man's relatives. He begins to make a speech in commemoration of a deceased person he doesn't even know, but the words flow spontaneously, cleanly, moving and exciting. After that speech he will become the funeral boy, the orator.

results.title: Polaroid
results.overview: Deok-jung, a taxi driver who speaks of death as casually as small talk, receives a terminal diagnosis. He buys a worn-out coffee vending machine — a mirror of himself — and sets out to find meaning in whatever time he has left. At a cheap lodging house, he crosses paths with Jeong-suk, a down-on-her-luck karaoke hostess past her prime. Moved by something he can't quite name, he offers her a deal: look after the machine, and he'll call it a relationship. Bound together by hardship and loneliness, the two begin to quietly tend to each other's wounds, and what started as a contract slowly becomes something neither expected. Before he goes, Deok-jung leaves Jeong-suk the vending machine as his final bequest — and in that rusted, weathered thing, she finds a reason to begin again.

Her unusual path ultimately leads her to an enormous act of solidarity.

No actual dialogue can be heard in front of the camera; Ikil’s voice is only heard as a Voiceover (V.O.). results.overview: Maribel and Jorge’s walk to school is no easy feat, as a zoot-suit-wearing Pachuco is hot on their trail, leaving the children to question the future of their community in the climate he creates.

The first named Matthew is kicked out of his house and forced to find a job to support himself, the second named Noah is a hot shot basketball player who suffers an injury and can’t fulfill his scholarship to play on the college team, and the third named Eric is a party animal type who’s bad habits are leading him down a dark path that he may never get out of.

However, her resort to extreme dieting precipitates a pathological cycle of anorexia and binge eating, ultimately bringing her to the brink of psychological collapse. It is not until a critical moment of realization that she discovers there is, in fact, no “Badi” at all—she herself is Bidi.

results.title: DOG DOG DOG
results.overview: A scarecrow and a pirate wander the desert looking for a boat before a cataclysmic flood wipes them out.

Drawn into an unfamiliar queer nightlife, he begins leading a double life that slowly starts to collapse back into one. Along the way, he must confront not only his feelings towards his friend, but also towards himself.

results.title: Hana and the Missing Sock
results.overview: On school picture day, Hana is offered ten thousand won for the sock she is wearing. Soon after, for reasons she can't quite explain, the money begins to weigh on her in an unsettling way.

results.title: Spare Me!

Standing in his way is a, tatted up loud mouth desperate to claim the same prize money to pay off a dangerous mob debt. As the unlikely rivals clash, the competition spirals into a showdown filled with outrageous antics. With everything on the line, it becomes more than a battle for money— it’s a fight for survival, redemption, and the only family either of them has left.

results.title: The Return of the Lifeblood

Consequently, on a journey to hell, an Entity confronts the Assassin in a philosophical-moral debate about the meaning of forgiveness, the imprisonment of guilt, and the existence of redemption.

results.title: Dr. Q

results.title: Problems of the Entire World

In his gaze, she recognizes a shared trauma. She feels like he is the only person, in the only place where they can coexist. Their silent companionship brings her one step closer to facing her trauma head-on for the first time.

In order to spend less time with annoying dads and moms, young people embark on their romantic journey through an exotic country, losing track of time. When his landlord threatens to evict him in 24 hours, he begins a race against time that will mark his definitive step into adulthood.

results.title: Murmur
results.overview: Murmur follows the real and metaphorical flight of a seagull, through the gaze of a female figure—suspended in indefinite time—who explores its physical and divine mechanics. Drawing inspiration from Nina's famous monologue from Anton Chekhov's The Seagull, Murmur engages—through a richly imaginative language—in a dialogue with the essence of a truly free art.

results.title: Faith & Forgiveness: A Duck Dynasty Love Story
results.original_title: Faith & Forgiveness: A Duck Dynasty Love Story

When the truth comes to light, both must confront everything they thought they knew about love and loyalty — and decide if their marriage and faith are worth fighting for.

results.original_title: Parce que le soleil se lèvera encore

SECOND ROUND is a coming-of-age documentary that intertwines Birdy’s gender transition with his inner emotional transformation—pulling back, pushing back, confusion, courage, fear, anxiety, and taking one last all-in gamble. We walk alongside Birdy through countless thoughts and struggles, witnessing a life crack open, grow, and ultimately find its way back to itself.

results.title: Oscillation

With her chihuahua sidekick in tow, Shelle encounters the joys of the open road, grumpy dispatchers, and lots of middle fingers sent in her direction.

results.title: Children of the Coast
results.overview: The film features a group of Afro-Mexican musicians from the Pacific Coast of Mexico. They live with the shore, speaking through their instruments and microphones about the traditions they cherish and the love of their homeland. Their music provides a space for the film to explore, encompassing both the historical depth and cultural characteristics of the local civilization, and paying homage to the people, the sea, and the land that exists here. Here, music not only flows with sheer beauty and passion, but is also the language that unites people.

results.title: The Woods Run Red – The Making of “Hunter’s Blood”
results.original_title: The Woods Run Red – The Making of “Hunter’s Blood”

Amid immigrant voices, archival images, and echoes of a haunted city, the past returns as an enigma that refuses to fade.

But in the bitterly cold northern city, tangled desires bloom like a thorned flower—hurting him in return. While his ex finally offers him an olive branch by expressing remorse with kisses, Hsing just snaps. In that moment, apology, forgiveness, and revenge collide, leading to an irreversible act…

The former war veteran shows no mercy, punishing the greedy and the rich. He has no choice – kill or be killed. He is determined to protect his missing younger brother's family by finding his brother's redheaded wife, all the while rebelling against the system and avoiding his many vengeful enemies.

results.title: One Eye Open
results.overview: We are far from the war that summoned us. As time passes, fog turns to frozen snow. Guilt mounts, the personal cost cuts deeper, and trust begins to fracture. Is this what war looks like? Are these its heroes?

results.title: Fossilized
results.overview: Linnie lives with her Nana in the unincorporated territory of Villegreen, Colorado - notable only for a nearby paleontological site. When Nana’s memory begins to fail, Linnie goes looking for evidence of the past.

results.overview: Two intimate episodes from a young man's life, one twisted conversation.

results.title: Etty part 1
results.overview: At the age of 27, in Nazi-occupied Amsterdam, Etty Hillesum embarks on a spiritual and emotional journey, all chronicled in her diaries. In them, she unfolds her turbulent love affair with the psycho-chirologist Julius Spier, a relationship that becomes the catalyst for a radical inner transformation, accelerated by the growing threat she faces as a Jewish woman. Her unusual path ultimately leads her to an enormous act of solidarity.

results.title: The Life That Will Come
results.overview: This documentary, made entirely of archival footage shot mainly by amateurs, revisits 50 years of Chilean history. A fascinating lesson in memory, this personal montage adopts a popular, even fringe, perspective to help write a more complete national memory. As the filmmaker asserts in her narration, there’s the history we’re told, the history we live, and the history we tell ourselves. Between the coup d’état of September 11, 1973, and the recent double failure of the new constitution project, this film shows that the people of Chile have long oscillated between excitement and disappointment, accumulating shattered hopes. Rejecting the pessimism that would trap us in collective immobility, Karin Cuyul instead draws on the past to ask how we can continue to dream of the necessary social and political changes.

What begins as a late-night craving soon turns into a tense and comedic clash between an impatient customer and a delivery driver pushed to his absolute limit.

results.title: Delivery
results.overview: J (23), an agent who wishes to return to a normal life, is assigned one final mission by his superior: to go undercover as an illegal courier. He sneaks into the environment to take down the drug dealers. At first, J enjoys his work. However, as time goes on, he carries out his duties reluctantly. He tries to quit his job, but doubts always linger in his mind. All that pressure left J unsure of what to do, and it was his own choices that trapped him in a dangerous cycle. There was one final mission for J and it truly became his last, because everything changed when his identity was exposed during that final mission.

As Saba, the grandfather guides the boy through this surreal reality, a violent storm strikes, tearing one of the ropes anchoring their home - and with it, their life together. After suffering a devastating loss of Saba, the boy embarks on an emotional journey in search of closure. Through a stylized and poetic visual language, the film explores life's fundamental questions: the paths we take, separation from those we love, and the endless effort to find closure, reconcile loss, and move forward.

results.title: Lech Janerka. Sleep On, Intellectual
results.overview: A journey between reality and a dream, the film takes us through the life of a legendary Polish musician.

results.title: Florescence
results.overview: A young married couple retreat to an English country house in an attempt to salvage Lucy's worsening mental health. John's strict instructions and their self-imposed isolation pushes their relationship to breaking point and Lucy begins to experience strange phenomena in the house.

results.title: Home Sweet Home
results.overview: Sofie begins her new work as a carer making home visits to old people. She is quickly confronted with the harsh realities of this challenging job. A precise, authentic representation of a profession that remains largely invisible to the public eye.

results.title: Off the Air
results.overview: Two estranged sisters reunite to sell their late father’s radio station, but the past won’t let them  leave quietly.

results.title: Exhumation (Dirt: Part Four)
results.overview: Exhumation is an extended poetic meditation on our relation to the soil, and the energies buried within it. Centuries of history, of conquering and re-conquering, lie beneath our feet, and the return of the vanquished is inevitable. There has also always been an alternative possibility, within the American landscape, of a more peaceful relationship with the soil, the resting place of our ancestors.

results.title: Saved by the Ball
results.overview: A few days after October 7, the players of the Kfar Aza soccer team who survived the terrible day decided they will survive only by rebuilding their team and play soccer.

results.title: Basement People
results.overview: Seven-year-old Tina is left in the care of her extended family after a traumatic event exposes the fault lines of a volatile household.

results.title: Missoula
results.overview: Montana 1998. The lives of a wide kaleidoscope of characters intertwine in a dramatic fashion as the romance between Clara-Belle and Rebecca tightens.

results.title: Blue
results.overview: A 16-year-old boy spends a quiet day alone at a remote beach when a mysterious girl in a white dress approaches him, leading to a brief, intimate conversation about life, death, and reality.

results.title: This Is How the World Ends
results.original_title: This Is How the World Ends
results.overview: When a war breaks out between humanity and the AI Machine States, the world is thrown into a state of confusion.

results.title: The A-Word: The Future of Aging
results.original_title: The A-Word: The Future of Aging
results.overview: Modern medicine treats diseases one-by-one, but what if aging itself is the root cause? The A-Word: The Future of Aging follows visionary scientists racing to extend lifespan and the rescue dog whose bond with an 87-year-old widower demonstrates the stakes of life extension.

results.title: Waste Management
results.overview: After a fated run-in with society’s discarded outcasts, an ordinary man tries to pick up the pieces of his life in a cruel, uncaring world.

results.title: Gray Hound
results.overview: When a party animal grandma underestimates the power of drunk decisions, her family catches a glimpse of someone they never expected her to be, and she must overcome the fear of being vulnerable with her loved ones.

results.title: Jônetsu Tairiku : Iyo Sky
results.overview: WWE, the world's largest professional wrestling organization, is said to be watched by over 1 billion people in more than 150 countries through television and streaming. The annual "WrestleMania" event attracts nearly 60,000 spectators, creating an excitement comparable to the American football "Super Bowl. "Only top wrestlers from around the world step into the ring. In 2018, a Japanese woman professional wrestler joined WWE. A former gymnast, she captivated audiences with her acrobatic moves, utilizing her flexibility and agility. And last year, she rose to become the WWE Women's World Champion. That's Iyo Sky. When Iyo appears in front of the venue, a huge cheer erupts. "IYO! IYO!". Autographs, high-fives, hugs, two-shot photos... Her popularity is soaring across America.

results.title: We All Are Cuchas
results.overview: In Medellín, Cuchas, a Queer punk band, challenges a scene that claims to be rebellious but rejects new forms of dissent. Through their music and daily lives, the documentary follows their journey of identity and resistance in an environment that makes their existence uncomfortable.

results.title: Tecolote
results.overview: In 1873, a witch marks a family for death.

results.title: The Dark Side of Married at First Sight - Panorama
results.original_title: The Dark Side of Married at First Sight - Panorama
results.overview: Panorama investigates allegations that raise serious concerns that welfare procedures on Married at First Sight UK have failed contributors, leaving them at risk of harm.

results.title: Idol
results.overview: A devout young girl is tempted by the siren song of a mysterious musician.

results.title: Ghosts
results.overview: During an all-night train trip, Jaśmina shares a compartment with Andrzej - a mysterious, older man. At first a conservative and reserved acquaintance evolves into a tender, empathetic and understanding relationship between two alien souls.

results.title: The Shamrock Keys
results.overview: A raw and lively look at a seven piece Irish band keeping tradition alive through spirited drinking songs, fast paced reels, and timeless jigs.

results.title: This Room Is Impossible to Eat
results.overview: Tereza, a teenager, is incredibly bold, especially in art lessons. Whilst the rest of the class is creating their artwork, she defiantly hands in a blank sheet of paper, claiming she has depicted a wall. She knows she can get away with more.

results.title: He Brings the News (Il apporte la nouvelle)
results.original_title: He Brings the News (Il apporte la nouvelle)
results.overview: An isolated couple with too much time on their hands develops an unhealthy fascination with their mailman. Violence and absurdity follow as they descend into a world of phantasmagoric delusion.

results.title: Left Unsaid
results.overview: Cas and Anna run into each other at a coffee shop long after they broke up. They miss each other, they regret everthing, but do they have the courage to tell each other?

results.title: Ginevra - take my hand
results.overview: Monica and Domenico are a happy couple full of life: they laugh, travel, then get married. A premature birth stops everything. Fears, fragility, depression arise. But Ginevra, even if a wren, manages to grow. The camera guides us on her journey: she lives, and with her her parents. He grows, plays, creates. In his eyes, however, there is a secret, a widening fracture. No one sees her. In adolescence many questions, difficulties and pain. Only by retracing the past will the adult be able to give shape to the pain and find an answer.

results.title: Grizzly Rampage
results.overview: A cabin getaway turns deadly when a rogue bear stalks five college friends, forcing the survivors to flee through the forest at night with a ranger guiding them.

results.title: Ride or Die
results.overview: A night out goes wrong when three girls have to face what to do when they kill a man. while also mending their friendship

results.title: Kids See Ghosts
results.overview: One night, Jayden, a young boy, listens to his grandmother tell a poetic story about the innocence of children and the ghosts that arise within them due to the actions of adults.  Through four stories, the film illustrates how these traumas emerge and leave lasting marks across generations.

results.title: This Body of Mine
results.overview: United by an unbreakable friendship, Rafael and Carolina embark on an emotional and geographical journey in search of reconciliation and acceptance. Along the way, we follow Rafael through the first years of his gender transition: an intimate process filled with challenges, discoveries, and small victories that bring him closer to the square meter of peace he so deeply longs for. A luminous story in which friendship becomes a refuge and the personal expands until it feels universal. Amid remote landscapes and shared moments of vulnerability, the film reveals the beauty — and also the harshness — of inhabiting a body in transformation in a world that is only just beginning to learn how to see.

results.title: Tornar-se Ciborgue no Interior
results.overview: Leo and Julia, owners of a rural property, want to have children but are facing fertility issues. Ava and Mia, a lesbian couple, have just moved to the neighboring property. The arrival of the two women will create tension with the neighbors.

results.title: The Box
results.overview: Three friends find a mysterious box and debate whether or not to open it and the consequences that may come from its contents.

results.title: Irving Berlin's Top Hat
results.overview: Inspired by the iconic 1935 movie musical starring Fred Astaire and Ginger Rogers, this acclaimed Chichester Festival Theatre revival recorded from the West End in January 2026 is directed and choreographed by three-time Tony winner Kathleen Marshall.

results.title: Adui
results.overview: When Lagum, a game ranger, is blamed for the death of a notorious poacher's son, he must navigate treacherous jungle terrain and village accusations to survive the wrath of Badan and his warriors.

results.title: Forgotten Solidarities
results.overview: A companion film to Miraculous Accident, Forgotten Solidarities returns to Nadir, Edyta, and Jarek from another angle: in 2025, Nadir, a Moroccan former exchange student at Łódź Film School, comes back to Poland to make a film from a buried past shadowed by 1968, where cinema, evidence, and intimacy blur into power, manipulation, and accusation.

results.title: Shadows Of You
results.overview: In the hallways of a university in Belém, Emmanuelle, a shy and observant photography student, silently falls in love with Lenore. Lacking the courage to confess her feelings, she begins leaving anonymous notes inspired by Edgar Allan Poe in the places Lenore frequents. Intrigued and captivated by Lenore, Emmanuelle starts secretly following the clues from this admirer, drawing the two closer to an inevitable encounter.

results.title: Forgotten Solidarities
results.overview: A companion film to Miraculous Accident, Forgotten Solidarities returns to Nadir, Edyta, and Jarek from another angle: in 2025, Nadir, a Moroccan former exchange student at Łódź Film School, comes back to Poland to make a film from a buried past shadowed by 1968, where cinema, evidence, and intimacy blur into power, manipulation, and accusation.

results.title: Shadows Of You
results.overview: In the hallways of a university in Belém, Emmanuelle, a shy and observant photography student, silently falls in love with Lenore. Lacking the courage to confess her feelings, she begins leaving anonymous notes inspired by Edgar Allan Poe in the places Lenore frequents. Intrigued and captivated by Lenore, Emmanuelle starts secretly following the clues from this admirer, drawing the two closer to an inevitable encounter.

results.title: COYOTE
results.overview: A late-night snack between two friends rapidly spirals into a high-risk heist, transforming their casual camaraderie into a tense partnership in crime.

results.title: Silent Voices
results.overview: In New York, a Korean immigrant family of four leads separate lives, each facing moments of defeat in their daily existence. As they navigate complexities of survival and disconnection, they each hide their wounds from one another

results.title: Newspeak
results.overview: A man finds himself in a place he can't recognize, accused of a crime he can't remember, and when he's punished, he is sent to "the room" a mysterious place that takes away his  agency and makes him the face of this malicious place.

results.title: Daughters of the Late Colonel
results.overview: After the death of their ill-tempered and controlling father, two middle-aged sisters find themselves at a loss.  An unexpected visitor sparks the courage in them to begin their lives anew.. ‘Daughters of the Late Colonel’ is a merry, rude, and lyrical, animated adaptation of the modernist short story of the same name, written by Katherine Mansfield in 1920.

results.title: Sleeping Beauty
results.overview: After a long separation, a young soldier and his sister are reunited under the full moon. This fragmentary fable is enough here to open up a cinematic universe in enchantingly composed vignettes: High-contrast chiaroscuro – an artistic technique that uses strong contrasts between light and shadow to create depth, volume and dramatic moods – frames the enigmatic figures.

results.title: High Noon
results.overview: A lone outlaw finds shelter in a seemingly empty saloon.

results.title: "HINDSIGHT"
results.overview: An experimental short surrounding the sun and it's followers.

results.title: Children of the Blitz
results.overview: During The Blitz, the British government had plans in place to evacuate approximately 3.5 million people, but only around 1.5 million left towns and cities for the countryside, with the majority of those being children. Children of the Blitz tells the stories of those who remained at home, often to help their families, or because their parents couldn’t bear to send them away.  Through the eyes of survivors who were children at the time, the film will explore how The Blitz contributed towards our sense of national identity and how the ‘Blitz Spirit’ is still held up as a defining characteristic of Britishness today. The film will also examine the starker reality for children whose homes were destroyed, including those who lost parents, and some who were left to fend for themselves - many grew up with their stories unheard.

results.title: Rainy Summer Days
results.overview: It's summer. Three friends meet. They will spend a few days in the mountains, camping, walking, chatting. As the days go by, so do their relationships, their misgivings, their affections. And when they return, nothing will be the same.

results.title: OLIVER BAAZ: THE NEON CITY SHOWDOWN
results.original_title: Oliver Baaz: The Neon City Showdown
results.overview: Directed and created by Sanjay Rao (professionally known as Oliver Baaz), "The Neon City Showdown" is a high-octane animated short film. In the glowing streets of a futuristic metropolis, the legendary hero Oliver Baaz faces an intense battle against a powerful robotic threat to protect the city.

results.title: Can't Hurry Love
results.overview: After a tough breakup, Xavier navigates his realationship with his best friend Amy, who obviously has feelings for him.

results.title: Paper Airplanes
results.overview: After the death of his brother, a young man is forced to confront his grave through memories and a quiet conversation with his mother.

results.title: $5 Margaritas
results.overview: On the busiest night of the year, Claire finds out the service industry is life or death.

results.title: Little Green Plots
results.overview: In the summer, family allotment gardens become a refuge from the urban hustle and bustle, and time there clearly goes by at a different pace. The camera observes allotment gardeners of all ages as they work and rest, capturing small gestures, brief conversations, and repetitive rituals.

results.title: Our Bodies & Other Shames
results.overview: When one of them is diagnosed with breast cancer, three childhood friends gather for a sleepover in the Brooklyn of their youth. There, they are confronted by their younger selves for an endless night of memories, secrets, and girlhood.

results.title: VEIL
results.overview: When Alex left his wife after saying “I do,” he thought it was his worst mistake. But after running over a woman, he learns some consequences don’t stay buried and the thing haunting him may be more terrifying than his jilted bride.

results.title: The Gaze of Sisyphus
results.original_title: シーシュポスたちのまなざし
results.overview: A university student investigates the truth behind a high school incident. As testimonies and rumors collide, the truth begins to blur, and her own past actions come into question. A youth suspense drama exploring collective psychology shaped by cycles of spread and conformity.

results.title: Weeyagale
results.overview: A magical-realist drama follows a young British-Ugandan girl whose classroom show-and-tell unlocks a dreamlike journey into her heritage.

results.title: Spooder-Kid: Origin
results.overview: We're going back in time to experience the start of it all, when Spooder-Kid gets his powers and how he decided to be a hero in his original universe. When an alternate version of Millon Dax creates a formula that infects a spider, Angelo must decide if its up to him to save his town from The Hooder. Witness the epic prelude to Spooder-Kid: Doomed World.

results.title: Earthqake
results.original_title: วัยซ่าห์ โลก(เกือบ)สั่น
results.overview: A story begin in 2012, there was a rumor that the world would end in this year, causing fear and selfishness in a small village. Bangpun, an eight-year-old boy who believed helping others was pointless because of his past emotional wound, decided to do one good thing before the end of the world by finding a birthday cake for his younger sister. Along his journey, he was forced to help others in order to receive help, gradually discovering the happiness that comes from kindness. In the end, although the world did not end, but Bangpun had learnt the true value of sacrifice and helping others.

results.title: The Last Election
results.overview: A look back at the "Last Election" moment of 2024 in America through several generations grappling with and attempting to reflect upon it.

results.title: Ż
results.overview: The Maltese Islands have long been marked by conquest. The fragile landscape that remains is being rapidly erased by greed and corruption. The film drifts through what is left, as a narrator searches for an absent figure in the textures of rock, clay and seaweed. An elegy for land and sea, an elegy for land and Ż.

results.title: A Life, A Manifesto
results.overview: The life of Michèle Firk, a trailblazing French journalist, film critic and anti-colonial activist who rose to prominence in the 1960s and 1970s.

results.title: Behold And Hear
results.overview: Four friends embark on a fated road trip that changes their lives forever.

results.title: Neang Phuong: The 1990s
results.overview: Khmer horror film.

results.title: Duro de Lembrar
results.overview: The young Beto lives among provocative conversations and exciting escapes. On a hot day, a talk about the future reveals more than expected.

results.title: The House After You
results.overview: A single father fearing abandonment must learn to let go of his only daughter as her wedding approaches, similar feelings conjuring up images of his late wife who helped him let go of his daughter.

results.title: Driving Me Crazy
results.overview: Nina knows why her grandfather hates her – obviously because she’s a lesbian. Time to come clean. In the weirdest car ride of their lives, Nina and Stathis will have to finally talk to each other whether they like it or not.

results.title: Madame
results.overview: To make ends meet, Laura takes a job working for Souria in a grand mansion in Paris’s Golden Triangle. Installed there by her lover, a wealthy Saudi prince, Souria lives in anticipation of his visits. As Laura struggles to adjust to this world of excessive luxury and constant surveillance, a fragile bond begins to form between the two women. But Laura senses that Souria is in danger, and that this gilded cage may be closing in on them both.

results.title: Bound to Die Trying
results.overview: A folk music duo drifts apart.

results.title: In Salita
results.overview: Ale is about to get married. His two best friends, Tom and Zenone, arrive at the ceremony and, prompted by Sara, a curious bridesmaid, begin to tell the story of what was supposed to be the perfect bachelor weekend. But when Ale shows up with his sarcastic fifteen-year-old sister Viola, everything changes. No luxury hotel, no excess: just camping tents, mountain trails, and a lot of (emotional) endurance. Alternating between present and flashback, between jokes and internal breakdowns, the protagonists discover that growing up is scary, but doing it together might just make it easier.

results.title: Lights on the Shore
results.overview: In northern Morocco, a massive fence looms over the landscape. Within it lies 12 square kilometers of Europe. The port of Melilla is one of the last remaining outposts of Spanish colonialism in Africa and a place where different cultures intersect. Distant voices tell the stories of the city. Caught between the colonial past and modern migration policies, they offer a glimpse into life at one of the most militarized borders in the world

results.title: A Closer Shave
results.overview: Private View Episode Three. Self care and razor blades.

results.title: Valencia - Chapter IV: Albacete
results.overview: The fourth entrance in The Valencia Saga.  With no one believing the events in Asturias, Dion's situation takes an even more sinister turn.

results.title: Don't They Know It's the End of the World?
results.original_title: Don't They Know It's the End of the World?
results.overview: Two people on a date realize their circumstances prevent them from ever having a serious relationship. They create a fantasy that they're married, leading to existential consequences.

results.title: Miss Neon
results.overview: In a southern Chinese factory town, two inseparable girls, Anke and Yun, share the same dream of becoming “Miss Neon” in their dull gray world. Anke longs to be closer to her best friend, but their pursuit of color and freedom ultimately pushes them further apart.

results.title: 93 'Til
results.overview: A struggling artist painter on the brink of eviction and a vintage curator haunted by inherited dreams skip the corporate future they're supposed to want and spend one day discovering whether love is worth the risk.

results.title: How to Conquer the World
results.overview: What will be left behind when humanity vanishes from the surface of the earth? Abandoned stations, schools and plants create a post-apocalyptic landscape of the world without people.

results.title: A WATER[S]
results.overview: Film director Jung-woong visits the cafe run by Sung-cheol. Jung-woong talks about the script he is writing, and Sung-cheol talks about the events that had happened in his life. Jung-woong asks Sung-cheol if he can use Sung-cheol's experience in his film.

results.title: Crushed
results.overview: After a drunken night, Jack becomes convinced he fatally struck his sister with his car. Years later, the weight of that night still haunts his family as they struggle with guilt and grief inside the walls of their father’s business.

results.title: Summer Windows
results.overview: When an ambitious teenager has different plans for her future then originally planned with her friend, she sets up a backyard concert in an attempt to get everyone together for one last time. She must decide if she will allow personal and technical issues get in the way of creating a memorable night

results.title: Aranya
results.overview: Six college friends set off on a weekend getaway into the heart of a sprawling forest, full of laughter, music, and playful adventures. But their carefree joy takes a sudden turn when they wander into a forbidden part of the forest, a zone where the air feels different, the shadows deeper, and an unseen force begins to stir.

results.title: How You See Me
results.overview: In an effort to reconnect with her grandfather, a young woman travels to northeast Poland to trace his ancestry.

results.title: Rodnee
results.overview: Rodnee is a broken schizophrenic consumed by drug-fueled binges and uncontrollable masturbation. His mind is over-crowded by disturbing hallucinations that manifest his traumas and most painful regrets as undefinable and monstrous pseudo-realities that constantly push him further off the edge of sanity.
